faqs.question: Where can I find the latest news about Rorebai products?
faqs.answer: You can find the latest Rorebai news through multiple channels: (1) LiTong website - check our news section for product announcements and updates; (2) Rorebai official website - visit www.corebai.com for company news; (3) Email newsletter - subscribe to LiTong's newsletter for regular updates; (4) Social media - follow Rorebai and LiTong on LinkedIn and WeChat; (5) Direct contact - contact your LiTong sales representative for personalized updates. We regularly post news about new product releases, technology updates, and application success stories.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to LiTong newsletter and follow our website for regular Rorebai updates.

faqs.question: How do I stay informed about new Rorebai product releases?
faqs.answer: To stay informed about new Rorebai product releases: (1) Register on LiTong website - create an account to receive product notifications; (2) Email alerts - sign up for email alerts for specific product categories; (3) FAE contact - establish relationship with LiTong FAE for early access information; (4) Quarterly reviews - schedule regular product roadmap reviews with LiTong; (5) Trade shows - visit LiTong and Rorebai booths at industry events. New product announcements typically include detailed specifications, application notes, and evaluation kit availability information.
faqs.decisionGuide: Register on LiTong website and subscribe to product alerts for new release notifications.

news.title: Rorebai Launches CBM94AD67 High-Speed ADC
news.summary: New 14-bit 250MSPS ADC delivers excellent dynamic performance for communications and instrumentation
news.content:
Rorebai has announced the CBM94AD67, a high-performance 14-bit analog-to-digital converter designed for demanding communications and instrumentation applications. The device features a pipelined architecture achieving 250MSPS sampling rate with excellent dynamic performance.

With 72dB SNR and 85dBc SFDR, the CBM94AD67 delivers high-fidelity signal conversion for wideband receivers and transmitters. The device operates from 1.8V and 3.3V supplies, consuming only 380mW typical power.

Key features include:
- 14-bit resolution with 250MSPS sampling rate
- Excellent 72dB SNR and 85dBc SFDR
- LVDS digital outputs
- SPI configuration interface
- Compact 7x7mm QFN package
- Industrial temperature range

The CBM94AD67 is ideal for 4G/5G base stations, software-defined radio, radar systems, and test equipment. Samples and evaluation boards are available now through LiTong.

news.title: Rorebai Launches CBM92AD16 Precision ADC
news.summary: New 16-bit 1MSPS SAR ADC offers excellent DC accuracy for industrial and medical applications
news.content:
Rorebai has announced the CBM92AD16, a high-resolution 16-bit SAR ADC designed for precision measurement applications. The device achieves 1MSPS sampling rate with excellent DC and AC performance.

With 91dB SNR and ±1 LSB INL, the CBM92AD16 delivers accurate conversion for sensor interfaces and data acquisition systems. The device operates from a single 5V supply, consuming only 15mW typical power.

Key features include:
- 16-bit resolution with 1MSPS sampling rate
- Excellent 91dB SNR performance
- Low ±1 LSB INL for high accuracy
- Flexible unipolar/bipolar input
- SPI digital interface
- Compact 4x4mm QFN package

The CBM92AD16 is ideal for industrial process control, medical instrumentation, sensor interfaces, and test equipment. Samples and evaluation boards are available now through LiTong.

news.title: LiTong Announces Authorized Distribution Partnership with Rorebai
news.summary: Strategic partnership brings Rorebai's analog IC solutions to broader market
news.content:
LiTong is pleased to announce an authorized distribution partnership with Rorebai (Corebai Microelectronics), a leading Chinese analog semiconductor company specializing in high-performance data converters, RF transceivers, precision op-amps, and power management ICs.

Through this partnership, LiTong will distribute Rorebai's complete product portfolio including:
- High-Speed Data Converters - ADCs and DACs up to GSPS
- RF Transceivers - wideband RF PLLs and transceivers
- Precision Operational Amplifiers - low-noise, low-offset op-amps
- Power Management ICs - voltage regulators and power monitors

LiTong provides comprehensive support for Rorebai products including:
- Technical consultation and application engineering
- Reference designs and evaluation kits
- Competitive pricing and flexible supply arrangements
- Local inventory and fast delivery
- Quality support and failure analysis

This partnership strengthens LiTong's portfolio in the analog IC market, providing customers with access to Rorebai's innovative, cost-effective domestic chip solutions.
